name: UBA : Ransomware Behavior Detected
notes: Detects behavior that is typically seen during a ransomware infection.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000850) Success Audit: An attempt was made to access an object
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when at least 500 events are seen with the same Username, Process Name (custom) and different Object Name (custom) in 1 minutes
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Windows Common Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
thresholds: when at least 500 events are seen with the same Username, Process Name (custom) and different Object Name (custom) in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Ransomware Behavior Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000850) Success Audit: An attempt was made to access an object
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when at least 500 events are seen with the same Username, Process Name (custom) and different Object Name (custom) in 1 minutes
AND NOT when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Windows Common Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Ransomware Behavior Detected
